string.text: A tightly sealed supply crate containing mission-critical tools and documents. Designed to keep its contents secure and protected during transport in the Zone.

A rugged, sealed black box used by military units to store critical data during operations. This device is believed to contain sensitive information about covert missions in the Zone. Although heavily protected, the contents could reveal secrets valuable to stalkers or faction leaders. Its sturdy casing ensures it survives harsh environments, but it is of no use outside specialized analysis.
